'''gapara''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mboga|mboga]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-p-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mboga|mboga]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| gapara
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:gæpæræth|gæpæræth]] || [[word:gæpæræj|gæpæræj]] || [[word:gæpæræsh|gæpæræsh]] || [[word:gæpæræ|gæpæræ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:gapaparath|gapaparath]] || [[word:gapaparaj|gapaparaj]] || [[word:gapaparash|gapaparash]] || [[word:gapapara|gapapara]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:gaparath|gaparath]] || [[word:gaparaj|gaparaj]] || [[word:gaparash|gaparash]] || [[word:gapara|gapara]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:gapafrath|gapafrath]] || [[word:gapafraj|gapafraj]] || [[word:gapafrash|gapafrash]] || [[word:gapafraf|gapafraf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:gaparatha|gaparatha]] || [[word:gaparaja|gaparaja]] || [[word:gaparasha|gaparasha]] || [[word:gaparaka|gaparaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:gaparath|gaparath]] || [[word:gaparaj|gaparaj]] || [[word:gaparash|gaparash]] || [[word:gapara|gapara]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:gaparathal|gaparathal]] || [[word:gaparajal|gaparajal]] || [[word:gaparashal|gaparashal]] || [[word:gaparakal|gaparakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:gaparathatha|gaparathatha]] || [[word:gaparajaja|gaparajaja]] || [[word:gaparashasha|gaparashasha]] || [[word:gaparaka|gaparaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:gaparathan|gaparathan]] || [[word:gaparajan|gaparajan]] || [[word:gaparashan|gaparashan]] || [[word:gaparakan|gaparakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:gaparathaoro|gaparathaoro]] || [[word:gaparajaoro|gaparajaoro]] || [[word:gaparashaoro|gaparashaoro]] || [[word:gaparakaoro|gaparakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|b863984}}
